figures_detected.description: Oil pan bolt tightening sequence diagram showing numbered bolt positions 1 through 12 around the oil pan perimeter
Cross-section illustration of oil pan drain plug washer fitting, showing the washer correctly seated against the oil pan

steps.text: Attaching should be done within 5 minutes after applying liquid gasket.
notes: Attaching should be done within 5 minutes after applying liquid gasket.

steps.text: Install oil pan. Tighten bolts in sequence as shown.
notes: Tighten bolts in sequence as shown.

steps.text: Always fit a new washer to the drain plug. Fit the washer as shown in the illustration. Wait at least 30 minutes before refilling engine oil.
notes: Always fit a new washer to the drain plug. Fit the washer as shown in the illustration.
Wait at least 30 minutes before refilling engine oil.
